programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When Ben stumbles upon a video of Cannonbolt ripping up a computer lab on the internet, Team Tennyson must race to State U to find the imposter. Ben discovers it is a steam-punk version of his alien.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Gwen and Ben compete to see who can spot more birds first while birdwatching at Pinnacles National Park. A forest fire interrupts their fun and Team Tennyson must hurry to save the bird population.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As Team Tennyson admires the efficiency of a modern train station, Ben is quick to sniff out one of Steam Smythe's robots holding up the line. The villain then tricks our hero into accepting a duel.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Billy Billions' efforts to carve his face onto Mount Rushmore with a laser are upset by Ben. The billionaire brat plots to remove Ben from the Omnitrix, accidentally opening a rift in space-time.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When Ben grows impatient with the snail-like pace of gardening, he goes O-E Overflow to pick up the speed and accidentally floods the community garden.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After a series of recurring nightmares affect his sleep, Ben refuses to open up to Max and Gwen about what's bothering him. Before long, they realise Zombozo is behind it.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As Team Tennyson prepares their boxcar for an upcoming race, Ben starts hearing voices and is unable to go Upgrade to enhance his car. Soon after, a mysterious Warbot interrupts the race.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After beating the Warbot and finding Vilgax inside, Ben's 'secret voices' worsen and begin to affect his sleep. Gwen discovers Ben sleepwalking and using campsite items to create his own Junkbot.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After the Junkbot shoots the Omnitrix and it begins glowing neon-blue, an imprisoned Vilgax explains it is now a gateway through which the Fulmini Empire will invade Earth.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While inside the Omnitrix, Ben and Vilgax must work together if they are to close the gateway, but once the Fulmini leader, the High Override, appears, even that might not be enough.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While Ben struggles to avoid the High Override's mind control, Max and Gwen enter the Omnitrix to lend a hand. Once they discover Ben is not who he seems, Max and Gwen must go all out to help him.

programme.desc: Warren stops off at the historic city of Pretoria, where he visits the local farmers markets and cooks Koeksisters - South African sticky donuts - with Pastry Chef Nonkosi.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren is in the bustling city of Johannesburg, and his first stop is the vibrant township of Soweto. He’s taken on a tuk tuk tour by his guide Sindi, and cooks up his version of Chakalala, a South African vegetable relish.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Cheese Master Afrim Pristine begins his cheese expedition in the Alpine country of Switzerland, home of iconic classics like Gruyere and holey Swiss Emmental.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Eating cheese is a national pastime in France. Here, Afrim uncovers the rich histories of cheesemaking across the country from Paris to Normandy.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes in the cheesy traditions of la belle province, Quebec, where family fromageries’ traditions have been passed on through generations.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In Japan's southern islands of Kyushu and Shikoku, Adam Liaw finds a vibrant, warm culture where the cuisine is as fascinating as its people.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam ends his taste tour through Japan with a trip to the island of Okinawa, where he discovers an eclectic cuisine and learns the secret to long life.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Mena restaurant-hops with friends Lilly Singh and Laura Marano, indulging in plant-based French pastries, "pastrami" sammies, Thai "chicken" wings and "carne" asada.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Spring comes to the Dales and North York Moors National Parks, the season when the parks' animals must find food, a mate and raise a family.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Despite its delayed arrival, for the Grey Seals at Ravenscar Beach winter means it is time to give birth. The newborn pups are now on the fast track to adulthood, with just three weeks to gain as much weight as possible before their mothers move on.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The two oldest rhinos are set to be released back into the wild. Three rhinos cause a stir as they go missing, while the younger rhinos make steady progress toward health and happiness.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Spring comes to the Dales and North York Moors National Parks, the season when the parks' animals must find food, a mate and raise a family.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Despite its delayed arrival, for the Grey Seals at Ravenscar Beach winter means it is time to give birth. The newborn pups are now on the fast track to adulthood, with just three weeks to gain as much weight as possible before their mothers move on.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: From heiress of a giant media empire to wanted felon, witness the strange saga of the Patty Hearst kidnapping of 1974.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes

programme.title: Aerial Italy

programme.desc: When the Croods return to Ahhh! Valley they find that the evil Brood family has taken over and Grug must work with fellow Valleyites to defeat them

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Sandy becomes jealous when the family gets an adorable monkhuahua/Eep and Thunk act like lazy “slaks” instead of doing their schoolwork and chores

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as “quicktogramming”/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a “super bug”

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When a Tuckapaw boy is unfairly arrested, Lucky and her friends plan to break him out of jail.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When an earthquake takes out the railroad bridge, the PALs must find a way to stop the oncoming train – which Jim is aboard

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: While Lucky is eager to celebrate her first birthday on the frontier, a surprise visit from her Grandpa stirs up a controversy.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Jim and Kate are getting married... or are they?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Butch LePray hold Jim for ransom, Lucky and Spirit team up with the unlikeliest of allies to get her father back

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The frontier gets a chill when Lucky, Spirit and the PALs attempt to rescue a missing girl

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Fed up with the rowdy FAST crew, Chet challenges them to go without racing; Skid and Shadow must defend the clubhouse alone against Clip and Clap.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Burn is forced to coach a lousy tetherball team -- and gets inspired by an old rival; White Shadow's karate skills are tested by a ninja stinkbug.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: When Dr. Fluffberg is outed as not being a real doctor, Archibald must help him through medical school where students are put through the trials of a simulated hospital. / Archibald dons the mantle of a singing telegrammer but runs into trouble when he loses the official “Grammer” songbook.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: After a memorial for a famous tree that has fallen, Archibald discovers that Sage has never cried and vows to help his brother get in touch with his emotions. / When Archibald wins the chance be shot from a cannon at the circus, he has no idea everyone in town is vying to be his plus one.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Someone stole Bebe's gavel and used it to break a window at the academy! Everyone seems to suspect Alex ... but Pru is certain he's innocent.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Voltron Coalition begins a massive liberation campaign while Lotor insists on building a ship capable of entering the Quintessence Field

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: LarryBoy's friends plan a surprise party but he thinks they're up to no good/Madame Blueberry becomes the best player on Bob and Larry's soccer team

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Larry gets a chef's hat and convinces everyone that he's an expert chef, but it's really Bob who's doing all the cooking/Bob, Larry, and Mayor Archibald get lost while hiking in the backyard.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When sea-dwelling dragons called Divewings start attacking ships near the island, the Rescue Riders have to find out what's making them so upset.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney draws and writes his own comic book, TZG secretly helps him transport it to the comic book store where creator Ken KaBlam is on the hunt for new talent. / When Ken KaBlam gets homesick for his own hometown of Crostonburg, TZG secretly recreates the things me misses in Harmony Harbor.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the Dews' Glitter Guide, Willow comes to check on the Dews’ progress, they feel like they’re failing to impress her, until Lola gets locked out of the apartment during a game of Hide-and-Seek and Dews work together to get her back inside. / When the Dew Drops discover a time capsule in the park, they set out to find the mystery owner.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. programme.title: Fangirl Fanboy
programme.desc: It tells the story of a wannabe actor and a talented teleserye dubber who agrees to help him improve his acting. Her coaching helps him achieve his dream of becoming a star only to find herself heartbroken when he becomes successful.

programme.title: Talk Back and You're Dead
programme.desc: This is a story of Samantha Perez (Nadine Lustre), a girl who unbelievably fell in love with a delinquent, hot-headed guy named Timothy Odelle Pendleton aka Top (James Reid), the leader of the gang, Lucky 13.

programme.title: Mary Cherry Chua
programme.desc: Mary Cherry Chua urban legend: High school student Mary Cherry Chua murdered by janitor. Film follows Karen (Ashley Diaz), avid reader of campus horror stories, as she encounters the legend.

programme.title: Penduko
programme.desc: Hoping to profit from his occult gifts, a mystic joins a shadowy society and must confront his own darkness as he finds his place in the underworld.

programme.title: Sumigaw ka Hanggang Gusto mo
programme.desc: Five murdered students, One terrified survivor, One mysterious killer on the loose.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Trophy Wife
programme.desc: Lani (Cristine Reyes) draws Chino (Derek Ramsay), his brother, Sammy (John Estrada), and his girlfriend Gwen (Heart Evangelista) into a complex game of revenge. Will it be too late before one of the men reveals his dark side?

programme.title: Dulo
programme.desc: A young couple on the verge of separation takes a roadtrip to patch things up. Will this journey save their marriage or will it make them realize that it's the end for them?

programme.title: May-December-January
programme.desc: A single mother tests her relationship with her teenage son when she starts an affair with his best friend, for whom her son also harbours feelings.

programme.title: Babaylan
programme.desc: An immortal woman falls for a dashing young man, without her knowing that his ancestor was her lover in the past. They must work together to escape an insane man who's after her fountain of youth.

programme.title: Room Service
programme.desc: Two lovers thirsty for sex, clash in one story to build an intense passion for love and aspiration.

programme.title: Hustler
programme.desc: George is an excellent pool player and has in fact, established a reputation in the field of billiards. Later, he decided to take advantage of his talent and used the sport as a source of living.

programme.title: Sunny
programme.desc: A Philippine adaptation of the 2011 hit Korean movie. Sunny is the story of a middle-aged woman who dreams to fulfill her dying wish to reunite with high school friends.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: An ambitious upstart leaves Wall Street to start an internet store that becomes a global empire, while a young computer programmer revolutionises the way we buy and sell online.

programme.title: History's Deadliest with Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From drug kingpins and serial killers to pirates, assassins, and murderous con men, these are the criminals whose bloody legacies earn them a spot among 'History's Deadliest'.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: From the destructive Viking axe, to the sacred but deadly Samurai katana, razor sharp blades wielded by fearsome warriors have spilt blood and forged empires.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: Burdened by a string of bad luck, the remaining participants find their chances of success begin to slip away. One survivalist addresses a ruined shelter, while another must find a way to avoid starvation.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick takes a trip down the rabbit hole after a seller hops in with a first edition of "Alice's Adventures in Wonderland." Can it make Rick grin like the Cheshire Cat, or drive him mad?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: An ambitious upstart leaves Wall Street to start an internet store that becomes a global empire, while a young computer programmer revolutionises the way we buy and sell online.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: From the destructive Viking axe, to the sacred but deadly Samurai katana, razor sharp blades wielded by fearsome warriors have spilt blood and forged empires.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: New, ground-penetrating radar reveals that a number of mysterious objects may be buried deep inside of the Mesa.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Along the Earth's north 37th parallel, there have been so many reports of UFO's that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway. Is there something about this latitude attracting extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump—and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.title: Forged in Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours—and the hunters must adjust to stay ahead. Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: Forged in Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Along the Earth's north 37th parallel, there have been so many reports of UFO's that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway. Is there something about this latitude attracting extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump—and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Gordon Liu plays an anti-Manchu rebel who escapes to the Shaolin Temple and learns what it truly takes to become a martial arts master by challenging the 35 Shaolin Kung Fu chambers, eventually creating the 36th chamber himself.

programme.title: Clan of the White Lotus
programme.desc: The head of White Lotus Clan, Lo, is a highly skilled martial artist who supports the Qing government and helps destroy the rebellion group. Hung from Shaolin who kills Lo’s brother, is being hunted and hides in another rebel Hu’s house. The clan attacks at night killing Hu and his sister, but Hung manages to get Hu’s pregnant wife to safety.

programme.title: Burning Stars
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a group of young idealists embarks on a dangerous secret mission amid a time of political upheaval. Through sacrifice, loyalty, and resilience, they discover their purpose and courage in an era defined by turbulence and change.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: As the Light Goes Out
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve in Hong Kong, a team of firefighters battle an out-of-control warehouse fire that threatens to plunge the entire city into darkness. The team must put their differences aside and come together for an ultimate battle to stop the fire spreading to a nearby power plant.

programme.title: The Viral Factor
programme.desc: IDC Agent Jon sustained grave injuries on a mission where the entire team was betrayed by their boss Sean. He accidentally got involved in a kidnapping case when he was in Malaysia to find his long lost brother, but finds out his brother is actually involved in the case and Sean is the mastermind behind it all!

programme.title: The Assassin
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Nieh Cheng has retired into hiding. However, when Premier Yen's family is massacred, he seeks out the reclusive swordsman and coaxes him into a final revenge mission in this epic story set in the Six Kingdom era.

programme.title: Invincible Swordsman
programme.desc: Legendary swordsman Ling Hu Chong is ready to lay down his blade, but a fateful encounter with a deadly cult leader pulls him back into a world of blood and betrayal. As the ruthless Invincible East rises to dominate the martial realm, Chong must rally a band of outcast warriors for one final battle to defend the land.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: This is a martial arts epic directed by Chang Cheh. In the Sung Dynasty, the government is run by corrupt officials, so Sung Jiang gathers 108 outlaws at Mount Liang and establishes a band of patriotic heroes to end the repression of brutal overlords.

programme.title: Table for Six 2
programme.desc: The sequel to "Table for Six", Bernard and Lung plan to get married while their eldest brother is away. Yet, the weddings spiral into a chaotic battleground with escalating family drama, creating a messy affair for everyone involved.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Habang nasasaktan, Lalong Tumatapang
programme.desc: The dream of a beautiful future together by two orphans came crushing down when Mario was mistaken for a bank robber and was sent to jail.

programme.title: Mistah
programme.desc: Real-life brothers Robin and Rustom Padilla topbilled this action epic about the Muslim conflict in the Southern part of the Philippines. Though diverse in outlook, they shared the belief that all Filipinos were brothers, whether they are Muslims or Christians, and hence, should not be at war with each other.

programme.title: Mortal kong Kaaway, Kaibigang Tunay
programme.desc: Lt. Eddie Ramirez (Roi Vinzon), is a dedicated cop. Raymond Martinez (Edu Manzano), an equally dedicated hoodlum. Two strong personalities both committed to their cause.

programme.title: Rocky N Rolly (Suntok Sabay Takbo)
programme.desc: The swindling trio of Rolly, Alex and Cleto earn big bucks by using different disguises to fool people. They soon join forces with ex-boxer, Rocky, who quit the sport after syndicate hench men beat him up for refusing him to join the game.

programme.title: Masamang Damo
programme.desc: When Joko Diaz placed his family in danger after getting into an imbroglio with fellow slumboys, he wisely contrived a plan.

programme.title: Ang Pagbabalik Ni Pedro Penduko (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Pedro Penduko (Janno Gibbs) who was decreed by a hermit as the savior of the world, which was under an evil curse. To fulfill his destiny, he had to go back in time and fight with the malevolent pair from hell, Lucifero and Lucifera.

programme.title: Paano ang Kahapon... Kung Wala na ang Ngayon
programme.desc: Two hearts so much apart of one found love "Verbotten" in a world not of their own creation. For they met too early for destiny, too late for happiness.

programme.title: Amo
programme.desc: This action movie tackles the issue of labor union. Starring Rudy Fernandez as Leon delos Reyes.

programme.title: Bagwis ng Lawin
programme.desc: Bagwis Ng Lawin

programme.title: Bruno
programme.desc: Bruno

programme.title: Bakit Manipis ang Ulap?
programme.desc: When love takes everything you have, will you still fight for it? Chanda Romero and Laurice Guillen will take you to the bitter world of love, family, betrayal and deception.

programme.title: Kumander Bawang
programme.desc: Herbert Bautista comes from a family of vampire killers. The male heirs reek with the stench of garlic and are endowed with super powers. There is a need for Kumander Bawang and is off to fight the vampire.

programme.title: Hatulan: Bilibid Boys 2
programme.desc: Bilibid Boys are young and daring but lost in a cruel society.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Humdinger's kitties make off with Mayor Goodway's book delivery truck. // Julius and Julia get into a sticky situation.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken accidentally shrinks Dora and Boots so it's up to Dora's little brother and sister to help get them big again. // Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Bunny Boyz boy band get super clean and sparkly before their big show!

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thésée", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. // When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's Farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely! // Uncle Otis is hurling down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car! Ryder and the Pups need to rescue him before it crashes.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's high tech waiter robot helps around the café, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town! // Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies! The Pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: Sam and Kit are on the case when the Mice Squad goes missing in the Arctic.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Capn' Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger who plans ot use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom. // Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the Chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle pretends to be a legendary ghost so that he can take Danny's new skateboard.

programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol find out what's happening!

programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: Friends S7 15
programme.desc: Joey's character on a daytime drama becomes more prominent--to the chagrin of the show's diva star. Phoebe and Rachel argue over who should return a sexy man's misplaced cell phone to him.

programme.title: Friends S7 16
programme.desc: Chandler finds out who Monica really wanted to have sex with on the night they became lovers. Ross is furious after Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes.

programme.title: Friends S7 17
programme.desc: Monica battles another shopper for the perfect wedding dress. Ross and Joey compete for the same woman.

programme.title: Friends S7 18
programme.desc: Joey overreacts at a daytime drama awards show. Ross sees Chandler leaving a male strip club.

programme.title: Magnum Force
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Clint Eastwood stars as San Francisco Police Inspector Harry Callahan better known as "Dirty Harry" because of the tough way he pursues criminals in this bare-knuckled action film. Investigating the assassinations of crime bosses, Dirty Harry discovers the killers are police who, frustrated by the judicial system, have vowed to rid the city of crime by any means--even killing fellow police officers.

programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
programme.desc: Stone Age Earth: In the presence of a mysterious black obelisk, pre-humans discover the use of tools--and weapons--violently taking first steps toward intelligence. 1999: On Earth's moon astronauts uncover another mysterious black obelisk. 2001: Between Earth and Jupiter, the spacecraft's intelligent computer makes a mistake that kills most of the human crew--then continues to kill to hide its error. Beyond Time: The sole survivor of the journey to Jupiter ascends to the next level of humanity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 12
programme.desc: When the guys finally agree to do something the girls like, it leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Sheldon.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 13
programme.desc: Sheldon worries his comfortable lifestyle is preventing him from achieving scientific progress so he asks his friends to make him miserable.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 14
programme.desc: When an online bully destroys Leonard and Sheldon's physics paper, the guys band together to take him down.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 15
programme.desc: Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic-book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches.

programme.title: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, "Into the Storm" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two sly government agents, one a charmer and the other a master of disguise, are sent to stop an insanely brilliant scientist who plans to assassinate the President of the United States.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: An explosive tale of double cross and revenge, "The Losers" centers upon the members of an elite U.S. Special Forces unit sent into the Bolivian jungle on a search and destroy mission. The team--Clay, Jensen, Roque, Pooch and Cougar --find themselves the target of a lethal betrayal instigated from inside by a powerful enemy known only as Max. Presumed dead, the group makes plans to even the score when they're joined by the mysterious Aisha, a beautiful operative with her own agenda. Working together, they must remain deep undercover while tracking the heavily-guarded Max, a ruthless man bent on embroiling the world in a new high-tech global war.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.title: ER S2 9
programme.desc: Greene's wife is in an accident; Doug dines with his mother; Carter lands Benton an interview; a patient enlightens Hathaway about her house.

programme.title: ER S2 10
programme.desc: During the Christmas season, a patient who resembles Santa visits the ER with a hand injury from making toys. Greene becomes upset when Jennifer asks to take their daughter away for the holidays.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 16
programme.desc: An experiment designed to make people fall in love piques Penny and Leonard's interest. Meanwhile, Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily encounter a "zombie."

programme.title: Friends S7 19
programme.desc: Monica's gorgeous cousin (DENISE RICHARDS) unwittingly wreaks havoc on Chandler and Ross. Rachel and Phoebe hastily plan a surprise bridal party for Monica.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 6
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus when four containers bound for Russia's Winter Games miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest, but can anything inside be salvaged? Plus, a Major League Baseball player gives Mo & Ty the lowdown on a state-of-the art piece of gym equipment

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 7
programme.desc: The Israelis hang ten on a sweet beach can, but one surprise item may send them off the lot in search of major dollars. Plus, Jason strikes on a container full of wood and weird gear, but will his investment land him in the gutter? And later, a mystery door may check one team into a big loss.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 9
programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 10
programme.desc: Four unique containers go up for auction after missing their holiday deadlines. A can of vintage nostalgia has Matt salivating, "Team Muscle turns into "Team Softy," and Uzi gets the scare of a lifetime. Plus, a mysterious logo could be the key tobig bucks

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 11
programme.desc: When jumbo-sized containers make their way to the yard, buyers use every trick in the book to win, big time. A bin full of outdoor BBQs could send two bidders up in flames, while a 'ready-to-go' rave unit sounds like music to the Israeli's ears. Plus, Mo and Ty feel the need for speed, but will their huge bet pay off?

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 12
programme.desc: Buyers battle to prove who's king of the playground and a can full of bicycle gear gets everyone's wheels turning. Plus, a mystery container includes one item that requires a special operating license. Who'll be able to haul it off the lot?

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 3
programme.desc: Will wants to go out with a beautiful girl he meets at the country club, but first he must figure out how to impress her extremely snobbish and very protective father.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 4
programme.desc: When Philip's parents visit from North Carolina, they embarrass him with stories of his poor rural background and his pet pig.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 5
programme.desc: A shady character named "Ice Tray" (guest star Don Cheadle – "Ocean's Thirteen"), one of Will's friends from Philadelphia, comes to Bel-Air for a visit.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 6
programme.desc: Will and Carlton are arrested and accused of committing a string of auto thefts.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 7
programme.desc: At Uncle Philip's insistence, Will joins his prep school's poetry club, and he enlists Geoffrey's help when he must present a "poet" for a reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 13
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q get eaten alive leading a business luncheon, and trip over their own feet selling running shoes. Plus, Murr loses his Mommy and his dignity in a crowded retail store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 1
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group, and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight's big loser

programme.title: ER S2 9
programme.desc: Greene's wife is in an accident; Doug dines with his mother; Carter lands Benton an interview; a patient enlightens Hathaway about her house.

programme.title: ER S2 10
programme.desc: During the Christmas season, a patient who resembles Santa visits the ER with a hand injury from making toys. Greene becomes upset when Jennifer asks to take their daughter away for the holidays.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: The National Finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining ninjas compete in Stage 3 and 4 and a $1 million winner is crowned as the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Coroner (Season 1)
programme.desc: When Dr. Jenny Cooper's (Serinda Swan) life is upended by the untimely death of her husband, she changes her professional focus, becoming the newly appointed coroner in Toronto.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: When paintings from a high-profile international cultural exchange are stolen – leaving a security guard dead – the team races to recover the priceless artworks. Meanwhile, Maggie turns to a friend for help profiling suspects.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue, FBI agent Jack Crawford becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior (Season 15)
programme.desc: Ninja couples compete relay-style on an extreme obstacle course in teams of two with one being crowned the next American Ninja Warrior Couples Champion

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy attaché is found dead with a USB lodged in his throat, the team tracks a killer believed to have ties to an international chess tournament in Sydney.

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: When paintings from a high-profile international cultural exchange are stolen – leaving a security guard dead – the team races to recover the priceless artworks. Meanwhile, Maggie turns to a friend for help profiling suspects.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: CIA (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a known smuggler is flagged at the New York border with unidentified cargo, Colin and Bill head upstate to track. To find this smuggler, they must enlist the help of a foreign intelligence officer looking to defect.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: A terrifying threat (Jason Momoa) surfaces from the past and is determined to destroy everything and everyone Dom (Vin Diesel) loves in the family's deadliest mission ever.

programme.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
programme.desc: The Super Mario Bros. Movie follows Mario and Luigi on a whirlwind adventure through Mushroom Kingdom, uniting with a cast of familiar characters to defeat Bowser.

programme.title: Cyril: Simply Magic
programme.desc: Join Cyril on a journey of self-discovery in various locations across Asia as he shares the marvels of his magic.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)
programme.desc: A blackout throws the city into chaos, forcing 20-Squad onto the streets for an emergency patrol day, which quickly escalates when Hondo and team uncover a terror threat.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)
programme.desc: Tan is left reeling when his girlfriend is kidnapped, and 20-Squad must race to track down a violent cartel leader who may be behind the abduction.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 1)
programme.desc: A murder near Camp Pendleton leads Gibbs and the team to a suburban mall in San Diego, where Gibbs takes matters into his own hands. Jackson Gibbs pays Franks an unexpected visit.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins (Season 1)
programme.desc: Still grieving the loss of his wife and daughter, Gibbs helps the team work a case involving a missing girl. The moment that irrevocably changed Gibbs' life is revealed.

programme.desc: It's an underwater sing-along! Sing about five little sharks jumping on the bed & an underwater spider!

programme.title: Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: Learn with Twinkle! She counts colorful balloons, learns shapes with sandcastles & plants beautiful flowers!

programme.title: A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: It's a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! She learns about cloud shapes & makes the moon sneeze stardust!

programme.title: JJ's Fun Home Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: JJ has fun learning at home! He does science experiments with TomTom & learns to make a PB&J sandwich!

programme.title: JJ's Big Pretend Play Dance Party!
programme.desc: It's a pretend play dance party! JJ dances like a robot, has a slumber party & explores outer space!

programme.title: A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming night with Twinkle! She helps the kids get ready for bed & takes Bao Bao on a balloon ride!

programme.title: A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.title: Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: Let's Play at Home with the Family!
programme.desc: Let's play at home with the family! They have a movie night in the backyard & create a crazy bubble machine!

programme.title: Baby John's Big Day Out Adventures!
programme.desc: Baby John is on a big day out! He visits the zoo, goes to a water park & explores a fun theme park!

programme.title: Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Join JJ's fun learning club! He counts apples, learns shapes at lunch & goes on a color scavenger hunt!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: JJ plays his favorite games! He plays freeze dance, makes funny faces & builds with construction vehicles!

programme.title: JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: JJ learns to stay healthy! He learns to use the potty, washes his hands & goes to the doctor for a checkup!

programme.title: What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? He moves to a new house, plays with a cardboard box & sings the ABCs in his soup!

programme.title: Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo faces squirrel trouble & other wacky problems, like a ghost in the house & a malfunctioning music mode!

programme.title: When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Arpo's imagination runs wild! He thinks he's a pirate, builds a rollercoaster & battles a jelly monster!

programme.title: Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: It's a bubbly day of fun! Bubbles invents a bouncy blob that goes out of control & spoils Pogo's magic show!

programme.title: Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods have unexpected problems! Jeff meets a messy guest & Lulu finds a mysterious egg that cracks!

programme.title: Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: It's a pirate adventure! JJ plays pirates on the high seas, builds a sandcastle & hunts for hidden treasure!

programme.title: Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's make, play & learn with JJ! He makes his own pizza, creates fresh fruit ice cream & fixes his toy bus!

programme.title: A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi learns how to have a healthy day! He learns about sunscreen, pizza-making & the benefits of sleep!

programme.title: Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Blippi explores wonders of the world! He climbs Mt. Everest, dives underwater & blasts off to the moon!

programme.title: From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi meets amazing animals! He helps a sauropod stuck in mud & meets a corgi who is a real-life knight!

programme.title: Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: Learn healthy habits on the farm! Ella learns to wash her hands, eat veggies & how to recycle!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: It's a dance party on the move! JJ sings "Wheels on the Bus," pretends to be a train & a brave firefighter!

programme.title: Let's Sing with All the Animals
programme.desc: Let's sing with the animals! JJ hosts a talent show, plays "Follow the Leader" & learns all the animal sounds!

programme.title: Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle take on the baddest baddies! They stop robot versions of themselves & an evil Orphle!

programme.title: Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's Orphle's big day of trouble! He makes colorful clones of himself & attacks his friends' cardboard castle!

programme.desc: The crew faces the biggest disasters! They escape an avalanche & rescue a friend trapped down a hole!

programme.title: Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes

programme.desc: It's an awesome Baby Truck adventure! She gets a boo boo in the park & pretends to be a rocket in outer space!

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Model Family

While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A construction worker is killed by a stray bullet during an attempted robbery inside a trailer park, but when investigators follow the trail of the suspects, things are not what they seem.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: Just after sunrise, investigators respond to a local hospital where an elderly woman is fighting for her life after a brutal six-hour assault. Though injured, the victim can describe the vicious assault.

programme.title: Sleeping with a Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a woman is found brutally murdered in her bathtub, investigators uncover signs of a staged cleanup and a jealous rage that points to a suspect from an unexpected place.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa puts it all on the line for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo to show once and for all he did not murder his wife, Janet.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S2)
programme.desc: After playing a demonic role, Malaysian actress Lavin Seow has a run-in with the supernatural; an uncle has to trap unfriendly spirits into a bottle before his niece would wake up from her coma.

programme.title: My Ghost Story Asia (S2)
programme.desc: Nine wandering spirits haunt a Singaporean family as they move into a new house; Karla Pambid from Philippines has a special gift - an ability to communicate with the unseen.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man arrested at sea tries to swim away from police; a man wearing a blue bonnet steals baby formula; a mom goes to extreme measures with a housemate and is arrested for assault.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A hyped-up man goes toe-to-toe with police; a woman flips off fellow drivers while dancing in the street; a pilot is arrested for allegedly stealing a plane; and more!

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: In 2019, Jim's daughter, Elesha, lost her job and needed a place to stay so she moved. Moving in with Jim however, dealing with the hoard has been the most difficult part of her life.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonising details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man attempts a daring escape from court; a judge has to deal with a defendant's outburst; an inmate tries to have his attorney removed from his case.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)

programme.desc: In April 1985, two western teenagers studying in Hong Kong were set upon by a gang of Chinese youths, who proceeded to torture and stab them to death.

programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home.

programme.title: L'Aventure Du Monde Des Mondes
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika
programme.desc: Flat tints, geometrization of lines, sharp contours... A landscape painter, with sky and water as recurring themes, Veronique Sudry shows both the omnipotence and the poetry of nature where beauty and unease coexist.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Born in Rwanda and arriving in France at the age of six months, Mamari chose humor to address her personal story, marked by family trauma and mental health issues. On stage, notably in ''Too Funny to Die'', she breaks taboos with powerful dark humor.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: He's French and a very young vice world champion in boxing, light heavyweight category: Yojerlin Cesar is Mathieu Laurent's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: A meeting with artisans reinventing coffee and chocolate, blending tradition, creativity and boldness, in a subtle dialogue of flavors. Yadh Elyes, master roaster in Paris' 6th arrondissement, offers exceptional coffees. Richard Orlinski is invited to taste rare beans from Tanzania and Panama. Chocolatier Clement Niel has settled in Bangkok, where he fuses expertise and local flavors. Inspired by the Khlong Toei market, he creates a spicy chocolate, the result of meticulous ingredient research, and brightly colored chocolate candies. Clement collaborates with Leo, a local producer, to select the ideal Thai cocoa beans, combining floral notes and cocoa intensity.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures
programme.desc: The guide Pascale Roy Lafontaine welcomes a group who have come to join his surf camp in Haleiwa, in the Hawaiian archipelago. The perfect opportunity for a hike along the Kuli'ou'ou ridge and admire its spectacular panorama, all amidst the lush vegetation of a unique ecosystem.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: We're off to the Musee des Beaux-Arts in Tours! In the heart of Paris, mosaic artist Luigi La Ferla builds and deconstructs his works. With Mame Kurogouchi, shape is sculpted from the body itself. Painter Camille Viry brings her landscapes to life using traditional decorative painting techniques.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer
programme.desc: On the menu: waffle bar, potato and cheese curd egg casserole, solo chakchouka, khachapuri.

programme.title: Parlons eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Grand echiquier
programme.desc: Singers, musicians, dancers, choreographers and young talent all come together to share the prestigious stage of the ''Grand echiquier''; turning it into the largest concert venue in France, just for the time of the programme.

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Alterrenative Voyages
programme.desc: Encounter with a collective of Senegalese women who have taken the initiative to collect and recycle the plastic waste of their village. Followed by a visit to a school that educates and trains its students in sustainable agriculture.

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: Red Carpet - Deliberations
programme.desc: The jury of the Red Carpet Film Festival meets to establish the awards list after deliberations. But artistic considerations give way to more personal issues.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Nous, Les Europeens
programme.desc: Swedish Lapland is known for its deep forests and northern lights, but it is also a region at the crossroads of major strategic and industrial issues. Two hundred kilometers north of the Arctic Circle, the subsoil of the town of Kiruna hides a treasure: the largest iron mine in Europe. In 2023, a deposit of phosphorus and rare earths was discovered there, perhaps the most important on the continent. Sweden has therefore made an unprecedented decision: to relocate part of the town.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: Henry Danger

programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.desc: Ray breaks up with Credenza, giving Danger Force only 48 hours to teach Ray how to forgive before his relationship is over forever. If Ray wants a future with Credenza, he must confront his past and learn to forgive his greatest enemy, Drex.

programme.desc: Jasmin, Baby, Violy and Daisy are siblings who lost their parents Elsa and Domeng in a bus accident after their scheduled out-of-town radio drama performance. They could only remain guardians for Jasmin, but not her siblings. Jasmin gets separated from her siblings when Father Barrientos sends Baby, Violy and Daisy for adoption.
